summary: Iteration 119 - Budget Bypass, MFA Flow, Managed Keys Health, System Health Testing Complete. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Admin Dashboard with System Health tab (DB ping, collections, storage, indexes, system load, query health), Platform Keys tab showing placeholder detection for ChatGPT/Claude keys, and MFA Setup panel in Settings Profile tab.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console for select/option elements - does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 119 verified: (1) Super admin/enterprise budget bypass working - workspace budgets for chatgpt/claude on ws_e82d079bc8ef are disabled (enabled=False), (2) GET /api/admin/managed-keys/health correctly returns 'placeholder' status for fake platform ChatGPT/Claude keys, (3) MFA endpoints working (setup, status, verify), (4) Admin system health endpoint returns DB ping, collections, storage, indexes, system load, query probes, (5) Managed Keys admin page shows key health with Placeholder badges for test keys, (6) No regression in /api/plugins/platforms and /api/integrations/status endpoints.
